scripts.api:db:upgrade: cd apps/api && python -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.verify: docker compose config && npm run api:test && npm run web:test && npm run web:lint && npm run web:build && npm run widget-sdk:test && npm run widget-sdk:lint && npm run widget-sdk:build && npm run widget:test && npm run widget:lint && npm run widget:build && npm run widget:release:build && npm run widget:e2e:chromium && npm run widget:build
scripts.widget:e2e:install: npm --prefix tests/widget-browser install && npm --prefix tests/widget-browser run install:browsers
scripts.widget:e2e:chromium: npm run widget-sdk:build && npm --prefix apps/widget run build:test && npm --prefix tests/widget-browser run test:chromium
scripts.widget:e2e:extended: npm run widget-sdk:build && npm --prefix apps/widget run build:test && npm --prefix tests/widget-browser run test:extended
scripts.widget:e2e:a11y: npm run widget-sdk:build && npm --prefix apps/widget run build:test && npm --prefix tests/widget-browser run test:a11y
scripts.widget:e2e:visual: npm run widget-sdk:build && npm --prefix apps/widget run build:test && npm --prefix tests/widget-browser run test:visual
scripts.widget:e2e:visual:update: npm run widget-sdk:build && npm --prefix apps/widget run build:test && npm --prefix tests/widget-browser run test:visual:update
scripts.widget:release:verify: npm run widget:install && npm run widget:test && npm run widget:lint && npm run widget:build && npm run widget-sdk:test && npm run widget-sdk:lint && npm run widget-sdk:build && npm run widget:config:validate && npm run widget:release:build && npm run widget:e2e:chromium && npm run widget:e2e:a11y && npm run widget:e2e:visual
scripts.widget:release:build: npm run widget:config:validate && npm run widget-sdk:build && npm run widget:build && npm --prefix apps/widget run release:build && npm run widget:inspect:production && npm run widget:bundle:check
scripts.widget:e2e:release: npm run widget:release:build && npm --prefix tests/widget-browser run test:release
scripts.widget:admin:a11y: npm run web:test -- components/widgets/widget-admin.test.tsx && npm run widget:e2e:a11y
scripts.widget:admin:security: npm run api:test -- tests/test_widget_admin_revisioning.py tests/test_widget_admin_origins_embed.py tests/test_widget_admin_b5_hardening.py && npm run web:test -- components/widgets/widget-admin.test.tsx
scripts.widget:admin:release:verify: python -m compileall apps/api/app && npm run api:test -- tests/test_widget_admin_revisioning.py tests/test_widget_admin_origins_embed.py tests/test_widget_admin_b5_hardening.py && npm run web:test -- components/widgets/widget-admin.test.tsx && npm run web:lint && npm run web:build && npm run widget:pilot:verify && npm run widget:pilot:readiness && node scripts/widget-admin-readiness.mjs
